name: Couscous Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Save about 2 tsp of urad dal and soak the rest in water for about an hour.
2. After an hour, grind the urad dal, green chillies, and ginger to the consistency of pancake batter and set aside.
3. In a pan, heat the vegetable oil and add mustard seeds. Add the saved 2 tsp urad dal, curry leaves (chopped), and red chillies (finely chopped). When the mustard seeds splutter and the urad dal turns golden brown, add 3 1/2 cups of water and the urad dal batter.
4. Mix well and close the pan. Let the mixture boil.
5. Add salt to taste.
6. Add the couscous and mix thoroughly using a potato masher to ensure no clusters form.
7. Allow the mixture to solidify, which should take about 5-10 minutes.
8. Remove the pan from heat and let it cool.
9. Once cooled, take small portions of the mixture and shape them into patties. If needed, add water or oil to make the patties easier to handle.
10. The amounts used in this recipe will yield approximately 30 patties. Serve with spaghetti sauce or any spicy chutney.
